falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would indicate extreme market pressure invalidating the current HOLD signal and suggesting a forced reversal rather than an unknown outcome.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price breaks above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout above this key technical level would directly contradict the HOLD signal and prove the pattern match to bottom_2024_aug is not valid.

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match percentage to bottom_2024_aug reaches 90% or higher
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Exceeding 90% similarity to a confirmed bottom pattern would falsify the UNKNOWN verdict by showing a high-probability reversal scenario is forming.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
